questions.question: What is the correct order of error handling layers in a Vue/Nuxt app?
Which Nuxt-specific file catches fatal errors and renders a full-page error screen?
Does app.config.errorHandler catch errors thrown inside fetch() in a component's event handler?
options: Yes, it catches all async errors automatically
No, fetch and other promises in event handlers need explicit try/catch
Only if you use $fetch instead of the native fetch API
Yes, but only in production builds
